title: phalaris arundinacea var. minor
intro: Phalaris arundinacea var. minor, also known as lesser reed grass or narrow-leavedreed-grass, is a type of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It is commonly used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phalaris arundinacea var. minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
